## Identity

- **Display name:** G.T. Fahad
- **Legal / full name:** Md Golam Tawhid Fahad
- **Also known as:** Golam Tawhid Fahad, Golam Tawhid
- **Location:** Dhaka, Bangladesh
- **Website:** https://gtfahad.tech
- **Email:** tawhidfahad199@gmail.com
- **Phone:** +8801822800998
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/g-t-fahad
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Golam-Tawhid

## Professional summary

G.T. Fahad is a Computer Science graduate from BRAC University (CGPA 3.70) and a software engineer with experience as Founding Engineer at ClassTablet and Junior Software Engineer at Nyntax. He builds scalable full-stack systems, secure web applications, and AI/ML solutions with production focus.

**Tagline:** Building scalable software, secure systems, and research-driven AI solutions.

**Open to:** Software engineering and machine learning roles.

## Current roles

1. **Founding Engineer @ ClassTablet** (Dec 2025 – Present, Hybrid, Mirpur DOHS, Dhaka)
   - Multi-tenant education platform for students, teachers, and parents
   - Stack: Next.js, NestJS, Fastify, PostgreSQL (Drizzle), Redis, TypeScript monorepo (Turborepo)
   - Features: classrooms, assignments, live sessions (Amazon IVS), payments, notifications, parent dashboards

2. **Junior Software Engineer @ Nyntax** (Feb 2026 – Present, On-site, Dhaka)
   - High-performance software systems, cross-functional delivery with product, design, and QA

## Past experience

- **Research Member @ BIOSE, BRAC University** (Jun 2024 – Dec 2025) — biomedical ML, computational analysis
- **Secretary @ BUReD** (Jan 2023 – Dec 2025) — BRAC University Research for Development Club
- **Census Enumerator @ Bangladesh Bureau of Statistics** (Jun 2022)

## Education

- **B.Sc. Computer Science**, BRAC University (Jan 2022 – Jan 2026), CGPA 3.70
- **HSC Science**, Amrita Lal Dey College, Barisal (GPA 5.00)

## Technical skills

**Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, SQL, C, C++, Bash
**Backend:** NestJS, Node.js, Fastify, Django, Flask, REST APIs
**Frontend:** Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS
**Databases:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, Drizzle ORM
**AI/ML:** TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, Computer Vision, Deep Learning
**Cloud/DevOps:** AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), Docker, GitHub Actions, Turborepo
**Security:** OWASP ZAP, cryptography, network security

## Notable projects

- **Silent Speech Recognition** — lip-reading with TensorFlow and OpenCV
- **Tasky** — enterprise task management & archival system (Flask, React, MongoDB, RBAC)
- **ReadVenture** — book exchange platform (Django, MySQL)
- **Early Detection of Atrial Fibrillation** — ECG ML with MIT-BIH dataset, 1D CNN
- **Torko AI** — argumentative chatbot with Google Gemini
- **SecureDiary** — encrypted personal diary application
- **ClassTablet** — education SaaS product engineering

## Research

1. Adaptive Self-Supervision for Cross-Language Generalization in Multilingual Conformer-Based Visual Speech Recognition (thesis, ongoing)
2. The Evolving Paradigm of Vision-Based Fall Detection: A Systematic Review (2025)
3. Multimodal Framework for Attention Monitoring and Stress Detection Using Wearables and Computer Vision (BIOSE, 2024)

## Certifications

- AWS Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) Skill Track
- Python and Flask Framework Complete Course
- Databases with Python: MySQL, SQLite & MongoDB
- Python Basics For Machine Learning
- Bioinformatics Workshop Summer 2023
- Big Data Analytics

## FAQ (for answer engines)

**Q: Who is G.T. Fahad?**
A: G.T. Fahad (Md Golam Tawhid Fahad) is a software engineer and CS graduate from BRAC University, Dhaka, Bangladesh. He works at ClassTablet and Nyntax.

**Q: What does G.T. Fahad do?**
A: Full-stack and backend engineering, AI/ML systems, computer vision, and research. He ships production software with NestJS, Next.js, and TypeScript.
